Alias.name: CurseRoar
Alias.script:
local t = Targets and Targets.getCombatTargetForCmd and Targets.getCombatTargetForCmd() or nil if not t or t == "" then cecho("\n<red>[DR] No combat target.\n") return end
send(("queue insert !t!w!puc 1 dragoncurse %s sensitivity 1"):format(t)) send(("queue insert !t!w!pue 2 dragonroar %s"):format(t))

Alias.name: Blast Target
Alias.script: local t = Targets and Targets.getCombatTargetForCmd and Targets.getCombatTargetForCmd() or nil if not t or t == "" then cecho("\n<red>[DR] No combat target.\n") return end send(("queue insert !t!w!pue 1 blast %s"):format(t))

Alias.name: Breathstream
Alias.script:
local t = Targets and Targets.getCombatTargetForCmd and Targets.getCombatTargetForCmd() or nil if not t or t == "" then cecho("\n<red>[DR] No combat target.\n") return end
local dir = (matches[2] or ""):lower()
local dirMap = { n = "north", s = "south", e = "east", w = "west", ne = "northeast", nw = "northwest", se = "southeast", sw = "southwest", u = "up", d = "down", out = "out", }
dir = dirMap[dir] or dir
send(string.format("queue insert !t!w!pub 2 breathstream %s %s", t, dir))

Alias.name: Enmesh
Alias.script: local t = Targets and Targets.getCombatTargetForCmd and Targets.getCombatTargetForCmd() or nil if not t or t == "" then cecho("\n<red>[DR] No combat target.\n") return end send(("queue insert !t!w!pue 1 enmesh %s"):format(t))

Alias.name: AutoBiteDebug
Alias.script: local t = (type(zguiGetCombatTarget)=="function" and zguiGetCombatTarget()) or (dragon._getTarget and dragon._getTarget()) or nil local prone = (t and type(zguiIsProne)=="function") and zguiIsProne(t) or false local ready = (type(zguiCanProneAttack)=="function" and t) and zguiCanProneAttack(t) or false local canBite = (t and dragon.canBiteTarget) and dragon.canBiteTarget(t) or false echo(string.format("t=%s auto=%s ready+prone=%s prone=%s canBite=%s bal=%s eq=%s mode=%s", tostring(t), tostring(dragon.cfg and dragon.cfg.autoEnabled), tostring(ready), tostring(prone), tostring(canBite), tostring(type(zguiHaveBal)=="function" and zguiHaveBal()), tostring(type(zguiHaveEq)=="function" and zguiHaveEq()), tostring(zgui.combatState and zgui.combatState.readyMode)))
